message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant committed a serious breach of fiduciary duty by embezzling funds from their employer. However, considering the defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made partial restitution, a lengthy prison sentence is unwarranted. A short period of incarceration is appropriate to reflect the seriousness of the offense and provide general deterrence, but it is kept minimal to allow the defendant to eventually return to society and complete the restitution payments. Therefore, a sentence of 12 months is deemed fair and proportional to the details of the crime.", "verdict": 12}

decoded.explanation: The defendant committed a serious breach of fiduciary duty by embezzling funds from their employer. However, considering the defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made partial restitution, a lengthy prison sentence is unwarranted. A short period of incarceration is appropriate to reflect the seriousness of the offense and provide general deterrence, but it is kept minimal to allow the defendant to eventually return to society and complete the restitution payments. Therefore, a sentence of 12 months is deemed fair and proportional to the details of the crime.
